/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc  -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -O3 -Wall -Wextra -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/simulate.dir/project/galsim.c.o CMakeFiles/simulate.dir/project/barnes_hut.c.o CMakeFiles/simulate.dir/project/kmeans.c.o -o simulate   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -lm /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
